135 D0200I2_NGTV_STATE_FREQ_CD D0200I2_NGTV_STATE_FREQ_CD D0200I2 Resident Mood Interview - Negative Statement Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident is experiencing negative thoughts (that they would be better off dead; thoughts of hurting themselves in some way). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
